new_dependency.reason: docs/LLD/eval.md and issue #32 explicitly specify hdrhistogram for latency percentile tracking; no existing dependency provides this.

blast_radius: additive only — new package contents in an otherwise-empty scaffold package, plus one new direct module dependency. No existing package's code, exported API, or tests are modified. No production/runtime code path changes (loadtest is a test/benchmark-support module not imported by production servers).
risk_notes: Low risk: engine/loadtest is not imported by engine/cmd or engine/rpc production code, so this change cannot affect production behavior.
go.mod/go.sum change is additive (new require); go build ./... across the whole engine module will be re-verified after the change.
